flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Kansas fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Kansas are 23% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($61.9k vs $50.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Kansas rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (18.4k → 21.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Kansas rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (49.9% → 55.0%).
